result.stdout:
LambdaSharp CLI (v0.8.4.1)

Project Home: https://github.com/LambdaSharp/LambdaSharpTool

Usage: lash [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  build         Build LambdaSharp module
  deploy        Deploy LambdaSharp module
  encrypt       Encrypt Value
  info          Show LambdaSharp information
  init          Create or update a LambdaSharp deployment tier
  list          List deployed LambdaSharp modules
  new           Create new LambdaSharp module, function, app, or resource
  nuke          Delete a LambdaSharp deployment tier
  publish       Publish LambdaSharp module
  tier          Tier utility commands
  util          Miscellaneous AWS utilities

Run 'lash [command] --help' for more information about a command.


Done (finished: 03/28/2026 15:49:17; duration: 00:00:00.0235731)

commands.payload:
LambdaSharp CLI (v0.8.4.1)

Project Home: https://github.com/LambdaSharp/LambdaSharpTool

Usage: lash [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  build         Build LambdaSharp module
  deploy        Deploy LambdaSharp module
  encrypt       Encrypt Value
  info          Show LambdaSharp information
  init          Create or update a LambdaSharp deployment tier
  list          List deployed LambdaSharp modules
  new           Create new LambdaSharp module, function, app, or resource
  nuke          Delete a LambdaSharp deployment tier
  publish       Publish LambdaSharp module
  tier          Tier utility commands
  util          Miscellaneous AWS utilities

Run 'lash [command] --help' for more information about a command.


Done (finished: 03/28/2026 15:49:17; duration: 00:00:00.0235731)

result.stdout:
Build LambdaSharp module

Usage: lash build [options] <<NAME>>

Arguments:
  <NAME>                              (optional) Path to module definition/folder (default: Module.yml)

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                        Show help information
  --no-assembly-validation            (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp assemblies
  --no-dependency-validation          (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp module dependencies
  -c|--configuration <CONFIGURATION>  (optional) Build configuration for function projects (default: "Release")
  --git-sha <VALUE>                   (optional) Git SHA of most recent git commit (default: invoke 'git rev-parse HEAD' command)
  --git-branch <VALUE>                (optional) Git branch name (default: invoke 'git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD' command)
  -o|--output <DIRECTORY>             (optional) Path to output directory (default: bin)
  --selector <NAME>                   (optional) Selector for resolving conditional compilation choices in module
  --cfn-output <PATH>                 (optional) Output location for generated CloudFormation template file (default: bin/cloudformation.json)
  --module-version <VERSION>          (optional) Override the module version
  --module-build-date <DATE>          (optional) Override module build date [yyyyMMddHHmmss]
  --force-build                       (optional) Always build function packages
  --force-refresh                     (optional) Always refresh manifests from their origin
  --build-policy <FILE>               (optional) Provide build policy document file path
  --dryrun[:<LEVEL>]                  (optional) Generate output artifacts without deploying (0=everything, 1=cloudformation)
  -T|--tier <NAME>                    (optional) Name of deployment tier (default: LAMBDASHARP_TIER environment variable)
  -P|--aws-profile <NAME>             (optional) Use a specific AWS profile from the AWS credentials file
  --aws-region <NAME>                 (optional) Use a specific AWS region (default: read from AWS profile)
  --prompts-as-errors                 (optional) Missing parameters cause an error instead of a prompts (use for CI/CD to avoid unattended prompts)
  --no-ansi                           (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output
  -V|--verbose[:<LEVEL>]              (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)
  --quiet                             (optional) Don't show banner or execution time
  --no-beep                           (optional) Don't emit beep when finished


Done (finished: 03/28/2026 15:49:17; duration: 00:00:00.0242523)

commands.payload:
Build LambdaSharp module

Usage: lash build [options] <<NAME>>

Arguments:
  <NAME>                              (optional) Path to module definition/folder (default: Module.yml)

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                        Show help information
  --no-assembly-validation            (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp assemblies
  --no-dependency-validation          (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp module dependencies
  -c|--configuration <CONFIGURATION>  (optional) Build configuration for function projects (default: "Release")
  --git-sha <VALUE>                   (optional) Git SHA of most recent git commit (default: invoke 'git rev-parse HEAD' command)
  --git-branch <VALUE>                (optional) Git branch name (default: invoke 'git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD' command)
  -o|--output <DIRECTORY>             (optional) Path to output directory (default: bin)
  --selector <NAME>                   (optional) Selector for resolving conditional compilation choices in module
  --cfn-output <PATH>                 (optional) Output location for generated CloudFormation template file (default: bin/cloudformation.json)
  --module-version <VERSION>          (optional) Override the module version
  --module-build-date <DATE>          (optional) Override module build date [yyyyMMddHHmmss]
  --force-build                       (optional) Always build function packages
  --force-refresh                     (optional) Always refresh manifests from their origin
  --build-policy <FILE>               (optional) Provide build policy document file path
  --dryrun[:<LEVEL>]                  (optional) Generate output artifacts without deploying (0=everything, 1=cloudformation)
  -T|--tier <NAME>                    (optional) Name of deployment tier (default: LAMBDASHARP_TIER environment variable)
  -P|--aws-profile <NAME>             (optional) Use a specific AWS profile from the AWS credentials file
  --aws-region <NAME>                 (optional) Use a specific AWS region (default: read from AWS profile)
  --prompts-as-errors                 (optional) Missing parameters cause an error instead of a prompts (use for CI/CD to avoid unattended prompts)
  --no-ansi                           (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output
  -V|--verbose[:<LEVEL>]              (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)
  --quiet                             (optional) Don't show banner or execution time
  --no-beep                           (optional) Don't emit beep when finished


Done (finished: 03/28/2026 15:49:17; duration: 00:00:00.0242523)

result.stdout:
Deploy LambdaSharp module

Usage: lash deploy [options] <<NAME>>

Arguments:
  <NAME>                              (optional) Published module name, or path to artifacts folder, or module definition/folder (default: Module.yml)

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                        Show help information
  --name <NAME>                       (optional) Specify an alternative module name for the deployment (default: module name)
  --parameters <FILE>                 (optional) Specify source filename for module parameters (default: none)
  --allow-data-loss                   (optional) Allow CloudFormation resource update operations that could lead to data loss
  --protect                           (optional) Enable termination protection for the deployed module
  --xray[:<LEVEL>]                    (optional) Enable service-call tracing with AWS X-Ray for all resources in module  (0=Disabled, 1=RootModule, 2=AllModules; RootModule if LEVEL is omitted)
  --force-deploy                      (optional) Force module deployment
  --prompt-all                        (optional) Prompt for all missing parameters values (default: only prompt for missing parameters with no default value)
  --no-import                         (optional) All module artifacts must exist in deployment tier bucket and cannot be imported
  --no-dependency-upgrades            (optional) Do not automatically upgrade shared dependencies
  --force-publish                     (optional) Publish modules and their artifacts even when no changes were detected
  --module-origin <ORIGIN>            (optional) Set alternative module origin when publishing
  --from-bucket <BUCKET>              (optional) Use specified S3 bucket to import module from instead of module origin
  --no-assembly-validation            (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp assemblies
  --no-dependency-validation          (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp module dependencies
  -c|--configuration <CONFIGURATION>  (optional) Build configuration for function projects (default: "Release")
  --git-sha <VALUE>                   (optional) Git SHA of most recent git commit (default: invoke 'git rev-parse HEAD' command)
  --git-branch <VALUE>                (optional) Git branch name (default: invoke 'git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD' command)
  -o|--output <DIRECTORY>             (optional) Path to output directory (default: bin)
  --selector <NAME>                   (optional) Selector for resolving conditional compilation choices in module
  --module-version <VERSION>          (optional) Override the module version
  --module-build-date <DATE>          (optional) Override module build date [yyyyMMddHHmmss]
  --force-build                       (optional) Always build function packages
  --force-refresh                     (optional) Always refresh manifests from their origin
  --build-policy <FILE>               (optional) Provide build policy document file path
  --dryrun[:<LEVEL>]                  (optional) Generate output artifacts without deploying (0=everything, 1=cloudformation)
  --cfn-output <PATH>                 (optional) Output location for generated CloudFormation template file (default: bin/cloudformation.json)
  -T|--tier <NAME>                    (optional) Name of deployment tier (default: LAMBDASHARP_TIER environment variable)
  -P|--aws-profile <NAME>             (optional) Use a specific AWS profile from the AWS credentials file
  --aws-region <NAME>                 (optional) Use a specific AWS region (default: read from AWS profile)
  --prompts-as-errors                 (optional) Missing parameters cause an error instead of a prompts (use for CI/CD to avoid unattended prompts)
  --no-ansi                           (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output
  -V|--verbose[:<LEVEL>]              (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)
  --quiet                             (optional) Don't show banner or execution time
  --no-beep                           (optional) Don't emit beep when finished


Done (finished: 03/28/2026 15:49:17; duration: 00:00:00.0240601)

commands.payload:
Deploy LambdaSharp module

Usage: lash deploy [options] <<NAME>>

Arguments:
  <NAME>                              (optional) Published module name, or path to artifacts folder, or module definition/folder (default: Module.yml)

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                        Show help information
  --name <NAME>                       (optional) Specify an alternative module name for the deployment (default: module name)
  --parameters <FILE>                 (optional) Specify source filename for module parameters (default: none)
  --allow-data-loss                   (optional) Allow CloudFormation resource update operations that could lead to data loss
  --protect                           (optional) Enable termination protection for the deployed module
  --xray[:<LEVEL>]                    (optional) Enable service-call tracing with AWS X-Ray for all resources in module  (0=Disabled, 1=RootModule, 2=AllModules; RootModule if LEVEL is omitted)
  --force-deploy                      (optional) Force module deployment
  --prompt-all                        (optional) Prompt for all missing parameters values (default: only prompt for missing parameters with no default value)
  --no-import                         (optional) All module artifacts must exist in deployment tier bucket and cannot be imported
  --no-dependency-upgrades            (optional) Do not automatically upgrade shared dependencies
  --force-publish                     (optional) Publish modules and their artifacts even when no changes were detected
  --module-origin <ORIGIN>            (optional) Set alternative module origin when publishing
  --from-bucket <BUCKET>              (optional) Use specified S3 bucket to import module from instead of module origin
  --no-assembly-validation            (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp assemblies
  --no-dependency-validation          (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp module dependencies
  -c|--configuration <CONFIGURATION>  (optional) Build configuration for function projects (default: "Release")
  --git-sha <VALUE>                   (optional) Git SHA of most recent git commit (default: invoke 'git rev-parse HEAD' command)
  --git-branch <VALUE>                (optional) Git branch name (default: invoke 'git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD' command)
  -o|--output <DIRECTORY>             (optional) Path to output directory (default: bin)
  --selector <NAME>                   (optional) Selector for resolving conditional compilation choices in module
  --module-version <VERSION>          (optional) Override the module version
  --module-build-date <DATE>          (optional) Override module build date [yyyyMMddHHmmss]
  --force-build                       (optional) Always build function packages
  --force-refresh                     (optional) Always refresh manifests from their origin
  --build-policy <FILE>               (optional) Provide build policy document file path
  --dryrun[:<LEVEL>]                  (optional) Generate output artifacts without deploying (0=everything, 1=cloudformation)
  --cfn-output <PATH>                 (optional) Output location for generated CloudFormation template file (default: bin/cloudformation.json)
  -T|--tier <NAME>                    (optional) Name of deployment tier (default: LAMBDASHARP_TIER environment variable)
  -P|--aws-profile <NAME>             (optional) Use a specific AWS profile from the AWS credentials file

  --prompts-as-errors                 (optional) Missing parameters cause an error instead of a prompts (use for CI/CD to avoid unattended prompts)
  --no-ansi                           (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output
  -V|--verbose[:<LEVEL>]              (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)
  --quiet                             (optional) Don't show banner or execution time

result.stdout:
Encrypt Value

Arguments:
  <VALUE>                  Value to encrypt

Options:
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information
  --key <KEY-ID>           Specify encryption key ID or alias to use
  --decrypt                (optional) Decrypt value before encrypting it.

  -P|--aws-profile <NAME>  (optional) Use a specific AWS profile from the AWS credentials file

result.stdout:
Create or update a LambdaSharp deployment tier

Usage: lash init [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                      Show help information
  --protect                         (optional) Enable termination protection for the CloudFormation stack
  --xray[:<LEVEL>]                  (optional) Enable service-call tracing with AWS X-Ray for all resources in module  (0=Disabled, 1=RootModule, 2=AllModules; RootModule if LEVEL is omitted)
  --version <VERSION>               (optional) Specify version for LambdaSharp.Core module (default: same as CLI version)
  --parameters <FILE>               (optional) Specify source filename for module parameters (default: none)
  --force-deploy                    (optional) Force module deployment
  --quick-start                     (optional, create-only) Use safe defaults for quickly setting up a LambdaSharp deployment tier.
  --core-services <VALUE>           (optional, create-only) Select if LambdaSharp.Core services should be enabled or not (either Enabled or Disabled, default prompts)
  --existing-s3-bucket-name <NAME>  (optional, create-only) Existing S3 bucket name for module deployments (blank value creates new bucket)
  --local <PATH>                    (optional) Provide a path to a local check-out of the LambdaSharp modules (default: LAMBDASHARP environment variable)
  --use-published                   (optional) Force the init command to use the published LambdaSharp modules
  --prompt-all                      (optional) Prompt for all missing parameters values (default: only prompt for missing parameters with no default value)
  --allow-upgrade                   (optional) Allow upgrading LambdaSharp.Core across major releases (default: prompt)
  --skip-apigateway-check           (optional) Skip API Gateway role check
  -T|--tier <NAME>                  (optional) Name of deployment tier (default: LAMBDASHARP_TIER environment variable)
  -P|--aws-profile <NAME>           (optional) Use a specific AWS profile from the AWS credentials file
  --aws-region <NAME>               (optional) Use a specific AWS region (default: read from AWS profile)
  --prompts-as-errors               (optional) Missing parameters cause an error instead of a prompts (use for CI/CD to avoid unattended prompts)
  --no-ansi                         (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output
  -V|--verbose[:<LEVEL>]            (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)
  --quiet                           (optional) Don't show banner or execution time
  --no-beep                         (optional) Don't emit beep when finished


Done (finished: 03/28/2026 15:49:17; duration: 00:00:00.0247539)

commands.payload:
Create or update a LambdaSharp deployment tier

Usage: lash init [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                      Show help information
  --protect                         (optional) Enable termination protection for the CloudFormation stack
  --xray[:<LEVEL>]                  (optional) Enable service-call tracing with AWS X-Ray for all resources in module  (0=Disabled, 1=RootModule, 2=AllModules; RootModule if LEVEL is omitted)
  --version <VERSION>               (optional) Specify version for LambdaSharp.Core module (default: same as CLI version)

  --force-deploy                    (optional) Force module deployment

  --core-services <VALUE>           (optional, create-only) Select if LambdaSharp.Core services should be enabled or not (either Enabled or Disabled, default prompts)

result.stdout:
Create new LambdaSharp module, function, app, or resource

Usage: lash new [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information
  --working-directory <PATH>  (optional) Module directory (default: current directory)
  --no-ansi                   (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output
  -V|--verbose[:<LEVEL>]      (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)
  --quiet                     (optional) Don't show banner or execution time
  --no-beep                   (optional) Don't emit beep when finished

Commands:
  app                         Create new LambdaSharp app
  expiring-bucket             Create an S3 bucket that self-deletes after expiration
  function                    Create new LambdaSharp function
  module                      Create new LambdaSharp module
  public-bucket               Create new public S3 bucket with Requester Pays access
  resource                    Create new LambdaSharp resource definition

Run 'new [command] --help' for more information about a command.


Done (finished: 03/28/2026 15:49:17; duration: 00:00:00.0245321)

result.stdout:
Create new LambdaSharp function

Usage: lash new function [options] <<NAME>>

Arguments:
  <NAME>                      Name of new project (e.g. MyFunction)

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information
  --namespace <NAME>          (optional) Root namespace for project (default: same as function name)
  --working-directory <PATH>  (optional) New function project parent directory (default: current directory)
  -f|--framework <NAME>       (optional) Target .NET framework (default: 'net6.0')
  -l|--language <LANGUAGE>    (optional) Select programming language for generated code (default: csharp)
  -t|--type <TYPE>            (optional) Function type (one of: apigateway, apigatewayproxy, customresource, event, finalizer, generic, queue, schedule, selfcontained, topic, websocket, websocketproxy; default: prompt)
  --timeout <SECONDS>         (optional) Function timeout in seconds (default: 30)
  --memory <MB>               (optional) Function memory in megabytes (default: 1769)
  --no-ansi                   (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output
  -V|--verbose[:<LEVEL>]      (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)
  --quiet                     (optional) Don't show banner or execution time
  --no-beep                   (optional) Don't emit beep when finished


Done (finished: 03/28/2026 15:49:18; duration: 00:00:00.0249679)

  -P|--aws-profile <NAME>  (optional) Use a specific AWS profile from the AWS credentials file

result.stdout:
Publish LambdaSharp module

Usage: lash publish [options] <<NAME>>

Arguments:
  <NAME>                              (optional) Path to module or artifacts folder (default: Module.yml)

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                        Show help information
  --force-publish                     (optional) Publish modules and their artifacts even when no changes were detected
  --module-origin <ORIGIN>            (optional) Set alternative module origin when publishing
  --from-bucket <BUCKET>              (optional) Use specified S3 bucket to import module from instead of module origin
  --no-assembly-validation            (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp assemblies
  --no-dependency-validation          (optional) Disable validating LambdaSharp module dependencies
  -c|--configuration <CONFIGURATION>  (optional) Build configuration for function projects (default: "Release")
  --git-sha <VALUE>                   (optional) Git SHA of most recent git commit (default: invoke 'git rev-parse HEAD' command)
  --git-branch <VALUE>                (optional) Git branch name (default: invoke 'git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD' command)
  -o|--output <DIRECTORY>             (optional) Path to output directory (default: bin)
  --selector <NAME>                   (optional) Selector for resolving conditional compilation choices in module
  --cfn-output <PATH>                 (optional) Output location for generated CloudFormation template file (default: bin/cloudformation.json)
  --module-version <VERSION>          (optional) Override the module version
  --module-build-date <DATE>          (optional) Override module build date [yyyyMMddHHmmss]
  --force-build                       (optional) Always build function packages
  --force-refresh                     (optional) Always refresh manifests from their origin
  --build-policy <FILE>               (optional) Provide build policy document file path
  --dryrun[:<LEVEL>]                  (optional) Generate output artifacts without deploying (0=everything, 1=cloudformation)
  -T|--tier <NAME>                    (optional) Name of deployment tier (default: LAMBDASHARP_TIER environment variable)
  -P|--aws-profile <NAME>             (optional) Use a specific AWS profile from the AWS credentials file
  --aws-region <NAME>                 (optional) Use a specific AWS region (default: read from AWS profile)
  --prompts-as-errors                 (optional) Missing parameters cause an error instead of a prompts (use for CI/CD to avoid unattended prompts)
  --no-ansi                           (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output
  -V|--verbose[:<LEVEL>]              (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)
  --quiet                             (optional) Don't show banner or execution time
  --no-beep                           (optional) Don't emit beep when finished


Done (finished: 03/28/2026 15:49:18; duration: 00:00:00.0246182)

List all modules at origin

Usage: lash util list-modules [options] <<ORIGIN>>

Arguments:
  <ORIGIN>                 origin S3 bucket name

Options:
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information
  --bucket <BUCKETNAME>    (optional) List modules from this S3 bucket (default: match argument)
  --origin <ORIGIN>        (optional) List modules from this origin (default: match argument)
  --include-prerelease     (optional) Show pre-releases versions (default: omit pre-release versions)
  -T|--tier <NAME>         (optional) Name of deployment tier (default: LAMBDASHARP_TIER environment variable)
  -P|--aws-profile <NAME>  (optional) Use a specific AWS profile from the AWS credentials file
  --aws-region <NAME>      (optional) Use a specific AWS region (default: read from AWS profile)
  --prompts-as-errors      (optional) Missing parameters cause an error instead of a prompts (use for CI/CD to avoid unattended prompts)
  --no-ansi                (optional) Disable colored ANSI terminal output
  -V|--verbose[:<LEVEL>]   (optional) Show verbose output (0=Quiet, 1=Normal, 2=Detailed, 3=Exceptions; Normal if LEVEL is omitted)
  --quiet                  (optional) Don't show banner or execution time
  --no-beep                (optional) Don't emit beep when finished
